name: Google Drive for desktop

version_check.notes: Google Keystone updater (proprietary). NO public version API. To detect version, download DMG and read Info.plist CFBundleShortVersionString.

notes: Uses Google Keystone updater (same framework as Chrome). Auto-updates silently in the background. No public version API exists. Version only available by inspecting the installed DMG's Info.plist. macOS 13 or later.
